intent: Spin up a dedicated slice for the autonomous vehicle corridor pilot launching next Monday.
We have a new B2B customer requiring guaranteed low-latency connectivity for remote surgery equipment.
The port authority needs a private slice for crane control and container tracking systems.
Provision a network slice to support the drone delivery fleet operating in sector 7.
Assign a slice for the national broadcaster's live 8K streaming event scheduled this weekend.
Our enterprise client in the logistics sector needs isolated network resources for their warehouse automation rollout.
A new eMBB slice is required to handle the expected surge in mobile broadband traffic during the national holiday.
Deploy a mMTC slice for the smart metering infrastructure the utility company is rolling out across the region.
The event slice provisioned for the trade fair can be decommissioned now that the venue has closed.
Remove the temporary slice we set up for the software testing environment last sprint.
Shut down slice NSI-4471 and free up its radio and core resources immediately.
The construction site monitoring contract ended — please tear down the associated slice.
We're retiring the pilot slice used for the AR training program; release its bandwidth back to the pool.
Clean up all slices created for the city marathon last weekend.
The IoT prototype slice is no longer in use after the lab decommissioning; please terminate it.
Pull up the full list of slices currently running across the network.
How many active slice instances do we have right now?
Display all provisioned slices for the eastern region, including their current status.
Need a snapshot of all live slices before the maintenance window starts.
Can you enumerate the slices assigned to enterprise customers in the metro area?
List all URLLC slices in the network along with their uptime information.
Show me which slices are currently active on gNB cluster CL-09.
We're expecting 40,000 additional connected devices for tomorrow's stadium event — raise the device ceiling on the venue slice accordingly.
The hospital network slice needs to accommodate more bedside monitoring units following the ward expansion.
UE quota on the agricultural IoT slice must be raised to onboard the new batch of soil sensors.
Reduce the maximum device count on the test slice; we're done with large-scale device testing.
The fleet management slice for the logistics operator needs to handle twice as many vehicles starting next quarter.
Cap the number of terminals on the visitor Wi-Fi offload slice to 500 during off-peak hours.
Our public safety slice is hitting its UE limit during large crowd events — we need more headroom.
The smart parking slice is nearing its session limit as more sensors come online; please increase the cap.
Bump up the concurrent session allowance on the video surveillance slice for the airport expansion zone.
PDU session headroom on the gaming CDN slice needs to be expanded ahead of the new title launch.
The retail chain slice keeps dropping sessions at peak hours — increase the session quota.
Lower the session limit on the inactive enterprise slice temporarily while renegotiating the SLA.
The connected ambulance service requires a higher concurrent session quota for reliable patient data streaming.
Adjust the radio resource block share for the video conferencing slice — it's competing too hard with the broadband slice.
Scale back the RB ratio on the background data sync slice during morning commute hours.
The remote diagnostics slice for the power grid operator is underperforming; we need to give it more RBs.
Reallocate radio blocks from the low-priority IoT slice to the broadband slice before the live sports broadcast.
The RAN resource ratio for the URLLC slice serving the robotics cell should be increased to meet latency SLAs.
Cut the RB share of the entertainment slice by 20% overnight when usage drops to free resources for maintenance traffic.
The gNB in the downtown cluster is overloaded — tighten the RRC connection limit for the non-critical consumer slice.
Set a stricter RRC connection cap for the eMBB slice during the stadium match to protect the emergency services slice.
RRC signaling overhead is spiking on gNB-0334; reduce the connected user ceiling for the affected slice group.
We need to allow more simultaneous RRC connections for the critical infrastructure slice serving the dam monitoring system.
Increase the maximum RRC connected users for the emergency responder slice on all gNBs in the flood-affected zone.
During the upcoming network congestion test, limit RRC connections per slice group to validate load-shedding behavior.
There are multiple alarm bursts coming from the transport links in the northern region — can you investigate?
End users in the business park are complaining about high latency on video calls since this morning.
What is the current throughput utilization across the core network for the last 24 hours?
